title: Lord Camber's Ladies
writer: Edwin Greenwood, Benn W. Levy, Horace Annesley Vachell
actors: Gerald du Maurier, Gertrude Lawrence, Benita Hume
plot: In order to win back an old flame whom he jilted to marry a singer, a British lord resorts to skulduggery. When his wife enters the hospital for treatment of a serious ailment, he finds that his old flame is now a nurse there.
